---
title: "Risk Class Activity"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

data(esoph)
slice_sample(esoph, n=10)
```

```{r}
# Aggregate cases and controls by Alcohol Level
alcohol_table <- esoph %>%
  filter(alcgp == "120+" | alcgp == "0-39g/day") %>%
  mutate(Status = ifelse(alcgp == "120+", "Exposed", "Not exposed")) %>%
  group_by(Status) %>%
  summarise(Cases = sum(ncases), Controls = sum(ncontrols))

print(alcohol_table)
```

```{r}
# 3. Compute the Odds Ratio

OR = alcohol_table[1,2] * alcohol_table[2,3] / (alcohol_table[1,3] * alcohol_table[2,2])

cat("The High-to-Low Odds Ratio is:", round(OR, 2))
```
